operator_goal: Configure the remote NixOS workhorse only after read-only proof gates pass.

required_preflight_gates.pass_condition: branch is main and no dirty tracked files
required MCPs are enabled or explicitly repair-carded

required_preflight_gates.command: vault_search Windburn Remote Workhorse Phase 1 contract-first canary

doctl account ratelimit; doctl compute region list; doctl compute size list; doctl compute droplet list; doctl compute droplet list --gpus; doctl compute ssh-key list; doctl compute snapshot list; doctl compute image list; doctl compute image list --public; doctl compute firewall list; doctl compute volume list
required_preflight_gates.pass_condition: all read-only inventory probes succeed after account auth

required_preflight_gates.command: doctl projects list; doctl apps list; doctl databases list; doctl vpcs list; doctl compute load-balancer list; doctl compute reserved-ip list; doctl compute tag list; doctl registries list; doctl monitoring alert list; doctl monitoring uptime list; doctl gradient list-regions; doctl gradient list-models; doctl gradient agent list; doctl gradient knowledge-base list; doctl dedicated-inference list; doctl dedicated-inference get-sizes; doctl dedicated-inference get-gpu-model-config; doctl serverless namespaces list; doctl nfs list --region <candidate-region>
required_preflight_gates.pass_condition: sidecar surfaces are captured or explicitly repair-carded before selecting managed services
SSH host key, host identity, and OS are captured
remote Nix is callable and flake metadata resolves

required_preflight_gates.command: snapshot/image candidate; firewall SSH+443 posture; known_hosts plan; size/region/image/volume fit
required_preflight_gates.pass_condition: operator can roll back before mutation and host key/firewall/snapshot risks are bounded

computer_use_entry_rule: Start with read-only host/OS/Nix proof. Do not mutate remote state until preflight gates are PASS or explicitly accepted with a repair card.
